summary: Phase 1+2 Frontend Testing Complete. Landing page rewrite verified (all sections present). Login page changes verified (no Google login, no Free Trial link, password toggle works). Admin dashboard changes verified (no Live Worship banner, sidebar shows church name, Powered by Solomon AI footer). Portal home changes verified (no 12-week streak, expanded membership journey, clickable events). Two data seeding issues found: Pastor Charles Nieman sermons not in correct tenant, Shannon's giving data not seeded.

data_seeding_issues.issue: Pastor Charles Nieman sermons in wrong tenant
data_seeding_issues.details: Videos with 'Pastor Charles Nieman' as instructor are in tenant 'abundant-church-001' but test users (Shannon, Maria) are in 'abundant-east-001'. Watch page shows 'Pastor James' and 'Pastor Sarah' instead.

data_seeding_issues.issue: Shannon's multi-year giving data not seeded
data_seeding_issues.details: Shannon user exists (shannonnieman1030@gmail.com) but has no person_id linked and no person record in people collection. The 178 donations mentioned in requirements were not seeded for Shannon.

action_items: Seed Pastor Charles Nieman sermons in tenant 'abundant-east-001' OR update test users to tenant 'abundant-church-001'
Create Shannon's person record and link to user, then seed 178 donations across 2024-2027
critical_code_review_comments: DemoWalkthrough correctly limits welcome modal to first 2 logins (count < 2 check in useEffect)
PortalHome correctly removed 12-week streak card and shows expanded membership journey widget
AppShell correctly shows church name in sidebar and 'Powered by Solomon AI' footer
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1+2 UI changes verified. Two data seeding issues need fixing: (1) Pastor Charles Nieman videos are in tenant abundant-church-001 but users are in abundant-east-001, (2) Shannon's giving data not seeded. All other UI changes working correctly.
